feed.title: The Early Stage Crystallographers Group
feed.subtitle: Where Early Stage Crystallographers can gather to learn and collaborate

entry.title: Welcome to the new ESCG website!

link.title: Welcome to the new ESCG website!

entry.content:
Welcome to the new ESCG website!

We’re currently in the process of shifting our website provider, but rest assured we’re working hard to provide you with the best ESCG we can. If you have any ideas of how we can make the new site even better, please get in touch!
entry.summary: Welcome to the new ESCG website!
